violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Cook touched face and then changed gloves during food prep but did not hand wash. -Cook did not hand wash upon return to kitchen (did hand wash in restroom).
General employee practices. — --Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. -Cook was not wearing a beard net upon arrival/during food prep.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Black refrigerator in kitchen found with temperature of 45F. *Recommended moving products to different unit until refrigerator is fixed/corrected to 41F or less.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Using 2 residential well table top fryers at counter top. -Cook line equipment is not fully covered by hood. *Exhaust hood with suppression lines is on-site, however, owner has so far been unable to get unit professionally installed.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Grease residue/debris at handles and in drawers throughout kitchen. -Underside of cutting board found wet. -Debris at edges of hot table cutting board.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Sani Sink found at less than 150ppm Quat. Refilled sink and still at less than 150ppm Quat. *Sanitizer is nearly empty and will be delivered tomorrow. *Corrected on-site, Staff made manual solution using quat Steramine tabs.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Hot water at hand sink has to be turned on at valve below sink due to continual faucet leak.--Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Waitress dumped sani bucket in hand sink.
